commit.message:
fix(pager): update header bytes 18-19 when switching journal mode

When set_journal_mode() switches to WAL, set write_version and
read_version (bytes 18-19) to 2 in the on-disk database header.
When switching back to a rollback journal mode (DELETE, etc.), revert
them to 1. Without this, standard SQLite tools cannot detect WAL mode
from the on-disk header and fail to look for the WAL file.

Reads page 1 from the database file, patches the two version bytes,
writes it back, and evicts the cached copy — following the same
pattern used by patch_page1_header in the checkpoint writer.

Adds test_set_journal_mode_updates_header_version_bytes to verify
bytes 18-19 are correct after toggling between WAL and DELETE modes.

Closes beads_rust #156.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(og): switch to @cf-wasm/resvg for Workers-compatible WASM init

@resvg/resvg-wasm uses WebAssembly.instantiate() which Cloudflare
Workers blocks. @cf-wasm/resvg provides a workerd-specific entry
point that handles WASM initialization correctly.

- Replace @resvg/resvg-wasm with @cf-wasm/resvg in worker deps
- Remove manual resvg_bg.wasm binary (bundled by @cf-wasm/resvg)
- Update vitest alias to stub @cf-wasm/resvg/workerd
- Add initResvg/resvgWasmModule exports to resvg stub

commit.message:
Fix trunk deletion logic for zero-generation surfaces (#355)

* change threadhold to S - 1 to allow zero-gen stuff

* Add test for zero-generations-elapsed surfaces and fix pandas impl

Add test_zero_generations_elapsed to verify postprocessing handles
surfaces where dstream_T == dstream_S (zero generations elapsed).
Also update the pandas implementation to use the same S-1 threshold
for consistency with the Polars implementation.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Inline _make_packed_df helper per review feedback

Remove the _make_packed_df helper function and inline the DataFrame
construction directly in the test_zero_generations_elapsed test, as
requested in PR review.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Fix uint64 underflow in origin_time/hstrat_rank for zero-gen surfaces

Cast dstream_rank and dstream_S to signed Int64 before computing
origin_time (in trie postprocessor) and hstrat_rank, preventing
unsigned integer underflow when dstream_rank < dstream_S. This occurs
for zero-generations-elapsed surfaces after the S-1 trunk threshold
change. Apply the same fix in both Polars and Pandas implementations
so the validation decorator comparison passes.

Also fix _apply_empty_output_schema to use UInt32 for id and Int64 for
hstrat_rank, matching the non-empty output schema. Update docstrings
to reflect the correct output types.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Fix empty schema id type mismatch and revert id docstring to UInt64

The id column type depends on the phyloframe version
(UInt32 locally, UInt64 on CI). Remove the UInt32 cast from
_apply_empty_output_schema and skip id type checking in test_empty
and test_single_genome to avoid version-dependent failures.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Ensure id column is always UInt64 in postprocessed output

Cast id to UInt64 in both the empty and non-empty paths of
surface_postprocess_trie (and the Pandas validation impl), so the
output schema is consistent regardless of phyloframe version.
Restore the id type check in test_empty and test_single_genome.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Use phyloframe.legacy.alifestd_count_root_nodes in CLI entrypoint

Replace the deprecated hstrat.alifestd_count_root_nodes call in the
__main__ block with pfl.alifestd_count_root_nodes to silence the
DeprecationWarning in CLI test scripts.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Use phyloframe in _alifestd_test_leaves_isomorphic_asexual CLI too

Same deprecation fix as _alifestd_count_root_nodes: use
pfl.alifestd_test_leaves_isomorphic_asexual in the __main__ block
instead of the deprecated local function.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Revert "Use phyloframe in _alifestd_test_leaves_isomorphic_asexual CLI too"

This reverts commit 3e8fb726bbb060d4a62711f2a43ab23bdb1c4f5d.

* Update tests-cli to call phyloframe CLI instead of hstrat alifestd CLI

Replace python3 -m hstrat._auxiliary_lib._alifestd_count_root_nodes
and python3 -m hstrat._auxiliary_lib._alifestd_test_leaves_isomorphic_asexual
with their phyloframe.legacy equivalents in all tests-cli scripts.
Revert the __main__ block change in _alifestd_count_root_nodes.py
to leave internal alifestd files intact per review feedback.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

* Use unconditional df.cast for id/ancestor_id in pandas impl

Per review: id and ancestor_id columns are guaranteed to exist,
so use unconditional df.cast instead of conditional if-checks.

https://claude.ai/code/session_011RTTXpTNmCMUJeWtfSmSRp

---------

Co-authored-by: vivaansinghvi07 <singhvi.vivaan@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: pipeline dedup on both list and board views (#137)

* refactor: proxy all Google Calendar calls through edge function

Remove all client-side token management (localStorage, gcalToken state,
refreshGcalToken, auto-refresh intervals). The edge function now handles
everything: status checks, event sync, event creation, and disconnect.
Client only knows "connected" or "not connected" — no tokens ever touch
the browser.

New edge function actions: status, sync, add_event (plus existing
exchange and disconnect). Internal getFreshAccessToken() helper mints
a fresh access token from the stored refresh token on every call.

Also handles the case where Google doesn't return a refresh token on
re-authorization (returns explicit error instead of silently failing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: deduplicate pipeline board views by address

Each deal now only appears in its most advanced stage on the board view
(Closed > Pending > Offers). Goal counts remain unchanged — they still
track all historical events. Applied to both seller and buyer pipelines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: apply pipeline dedup to both list and board views

The previous dedup only applied to the board view, so refreshing the
page (which defaults to list view) still showed duplicates. Now both
views share the same dedup logic via a single IIFE that computes
filtered arrays for both seller and buyer pipelines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Derik J Bannister <derikbannister9@Deriks-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(frontend): show case title as subtitle on case detail page (#307) (#315)

The case detail page heading previously showed the case title as the h1
when available, with the case number as a small subtitle. This was
inconsistent with how users identify cases (by number first) and the
mockup in the issue.

Now the case number is always the h1 heading, and the case title appears
as a prominent subtitle below it when available. Cases without a title
continue to display correctly with just the case number.

Closes #307

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(reports): affichage rapport expédition dans CombatModal

- log[] affiché ligne par ligne en style console
- lost_ships par type (badges rouges)
- syndicate_credits_earned si > 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace all mock/hardcoded data with real Prisma DB queries (#9)

- Cases API: query Consultation model by user role (client/lawyer/admin)
- Documents API: query LawyerDocument with role-based filtering
- Verification API: replace in-memory Map with Prisma lawyerProfile upsert
- Admin verifications: real DB queries + actual status update via Prisma
- Team page: server component querying users by firm membership
- LawyerDashboard: real stats (clients, pending consultations, earnings)
- ClientDashboard: real stats (consultations, chats, upcoming)
- Homepage: add client dashboard widget for logged-in users
- i18n: add new keys for dynamic labels (en/zh-CN/zh-TW)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove hardcoded API key, add CNAME for Stadia domain auth

commit.message:
Improve error handling for missing database tables

Show a friendly message when a table doesn't exist yet in Supabase,
instead of just a generic error string.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Separate post template type from page (#29)

* Separate post template type from page for independent layouts

Posts and pages now use distinct template types. The engine selects
the correct template based on content type, with a post→page fallback
for backwards compatibility. Full support across AI builder, restyle
flow, admin forms, and template list views.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update browser tab title on HTMX navigation via HX-Title header

HTMX partial renders only swap #main-content, leaving the <title> tag
stale. Now the renderer executes the title template block and sends it
as the HX-Title response header, which HTMX picks up automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix lint: gosec, nestif, noinlineerr from CI

Extract buildRestylePreviewData helper to reduce nesting in post
preview block. Add nolint:gosec for template.HTML in admin-only
preview context. Use plain assignment for title template execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(simulation): Klimasimulations-Engine mit RCP-Szenarien (#9) (#10)

Implementiert vollständige Simulationslogik:
- SimulationEngine mit linearer CO₂-Projektion (IPCC-Formel)
- Strahlungsantrieb (5.35 × ln(C/C₀)) und Temperaturanomalie (ECS)
- Alle RCP-Szenarien (2.6/4.5/6.0/8.5) + CUSTOM
- compare_scenarios() für Szenario-Vergleich
- API-Router auf SimulationEngine umgestellt
- 36 Unit-Tests, 100% Coverage

SymbolDetective: fix file download — pass live ModelObj instead of re-loading by UID

Store the already-loaded ModelObject on DatasetFile.ModelObj ([ScriptIgnore]).
FileDownloader now uses those directly for GetFileReadTickets rather than
re-calling LoadObjects, avoiding the strong-type cast failure.
Added CLR type logging so we can confirm ImanFile cast succeeds at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add inline item editing

Tap any list item to edit it in place. Enter or blur saves; Escape cancels.
No-op if the value is unchanged. Auto-save picks up edits via existing 800ms
debounce. Marks the organized result stale on edit, same as add/remove.

Works in both the main app and shared list view.
